title: Ignoring
description: Ignoring chat/renders, etc. for specific players
body:
# ✨What is Ignoring?
Ignoring is player blocking mod for Fabric. Have you ever not wanted to see certain people on your server? This mod will help you avoid seeing them.
# ✅ Features
- Ignoring a blocked player's chat
- Hiding the appearance of blocked players
- Hiding the names of blocked players from server ping list
- ...and More!
# ❤️️ Requires
This mod requires Fabric Api, Cloth Config.
